title: Generate R program to derive ADAE (Adverse Events (relatedness))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADAE (Adverse Events (relatedness)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: AREL, ARELNUM, TRTEMFL, TRTP, TRTA, (3) Handle causality assessment mapping, relatedness analysis flag, planned vs actual treatment propagation, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 1191 records.
